serverNameMaxLength: Server name must be 100 characters or less
serverDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell people what this server is about
descriptionMaxLength: Description must be 500 characters or less
deleteServerWarning: Deleting a server is permanent and cannot be undone. All channels, messages, and members will be lost.
rolesDescription: Change member roles and manage permissions.
transferOwnershipWarning: This will make the selected member the server owner. You will be demoted to admin. This action cannot be undone.
privateChannelHelp: Only selected roles can see this channel.
readOnlyChannelHelp: Only admins and above can send messages.
